title: hyptis odorata
intro: Hyptis odorata, also known as Indian pennywort or Mexican tea, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hyptis odorata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the management of various health conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. Hyptis odorata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
